---
title: "0-Setup"
author: "Ethan Rogers"
date: "2025-07-17"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Dependencies

This workflow requires the following packages and their dependencies:
- Cardinal 3.6*
- Tidyverse
- data.table
- fuzzyjoin (for feature dimensi)


```{r cars}

```
